title: Pneumococcal vaccine counseling
specialty: Preventive care / screening / counseling / administrative documentation
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Requires screening before each dose and identifies severe previous reaction, acute illness severity, and immunosuppression-related precautions.
assessment.rationale: Supports clinician assessment of entered contraindications and precautions for pneumococcal vaccine counselling; no decision is generated.

source.title: Guidelines for Best Practice in Immunization
source.population: Children, adolescents, and adults receiving immunization services, including the national childhood programme.
source.setting: All DHA-licensed public and private healthcare settings in Dubai.
source.exclusions: Direct for immunization-service documentation in Dubai; partial for a generic child vaccination workflow outside Dubai or beyond the reviewed sections.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Requires screening before each dose and identifies severe previous reaction, acute illness severity, and immunosuppression-related precautions.

assessment.text: Defines consent context, scheduled-dose and history checks, illness, previous severe reaction, immune status, medication and recent-vaccine screening.
assessment.rationale: Supports consent, preparation and screening documentation for pneumococcal vaccine counselling; no decision is generated.

exact_location.heading: 15. Recommendation Eleven: Vaccine Administration and Recording — consent, preparation, screening, and interview questions

source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines consent context, scheduled-dose and history checks, illness, previous severe reaction, immune status, medication and recent-vaccine screening.

assessment.text: Requires benefits and risks discussion and after-care information on common effects, when to seek attention, and when to notify the facility.
assessment.rationale: Supports clinician-delivered education and aftercare documentation for pneumococcal vaccine counselling; no decision is generated.
